variables.notes: No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to COGS / property costs appears in the operating section above financial lines. Therefore D&A is assumed embedded in the selected parent row 'Property costs', so nothing should be added separately.

No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to SG&A / central administration appears in the operating section above financial lines. Therefore D&A is assumed embedded in the selected parent row 'Central administration', so nothing should be added separately.
